spec_match.rationale: Concepts exercise the exact current WICG surface: encapsulateBits/decapsulateBits round-trip with raw-public export (ml-kem-key-exchange), sign/verify + getPublicKey (ml-dsa-signatures), ChaCha20-Poly1305 AeadParams with 12-byte nonce and tag-verified rejection (chacha20-poly1305), encapsulateKey/decapsulateKey into AES-GCM (hybrid-session-key), and SubtleCrypto.supports()-first capability detection on the interface object with a crypto.subtle.generateKey() fallback (capability-matrix). Key usages match the spec's KeyUsage extension (encapsulateKey/encapsulateBits on the public side, decapsulateKey/decapsulateBits on the private side).

interactive.rationale: Every concept makes real WebCrypto calls (the static SubtleCrypto.supports() or crypto.subtle instance methods) with honest negative branches: parameter-set selects, run/reset, tamper switches that must flip verification/decryption results, a wrong-nonce OperationError probe, and per-cell detection-method labels (supports() vs generateKey()).

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index lede now distinguishes the full instance-member set (encapsulateKey/Bits, decapsulateKey/Bits, getPublicKey) from static SubtleCrypto.supports() on the interface object; the capability-matrix card and enabling-it section match the current sources (supports() ships under the same WebCryptoPQC gate per subtle_crypto.idl; dev trial 150 vs registerable OT 151–154 with no default-on milestone, chromestatus API updated 2026-06-17).

edge_cases.rationale: Honest negative branches everywhere: flag-off banners and disabled controls, tampered-message/tag rejections asserted as the correct contract, wrong-nonce rejection, X-Wing listed-but-unimplemented shown as a real 'no' (X-Wing is in the chromestatus summary for this feature but absent from both the WICG spec and Chromium), and the private-key label corrected from 'non-extractable' (the demo generates extractable=true to export raw-public) to 'never leaves this page'.

references.rationale: Index cites chromestatus.com/feature/5198951632470016, the WICG modern-algos draft, the base WebCrypto REC, and the FIPS/RFC normative references; capability-matrix's supports() claim links Chromium subtle_crypto.idl (RuntimeEnabled=WebCryptoPQC on all six new members, verified in main).

conformance.rationale: New immutable feature suite (this cycle, 8 assertions): the five new crypto.subtle instance member types plus static SubtleCrypto.supports() on the interface object, under their spec IDL names (all RuntimeEnabled=WebCryptoPQC in Chromium), the [SecureContext] gate, and a supports()-returns-boolean check for a spec-registered ML-KEM name. Anchors verified against the spec's real IDs. Executes live at /v150/algorithm-updates-in-webcrypto/conformance/.

runtime_evidence.rationale: chrome-devtools-mcp on Chrome stable (2026-07-24): all visible controls exercised at 1280×800 and 390×844 — KEM run/reset with honest 'encapsulateBits is unavailable' error, DSA sign/verify disabled-state honesty, ChaCha encrypt/decrypt/bad-nonce controls, hybrid 5-step activation, capability-matrix re-run with per-cell via-labels and X-Wing 'no', zero console errors and zero failed requests.

telemetry_health.rationale: Concepts emit showcaseTelemetry.assert events per branch (mlkem-secrets-match/supported, mldsa-sign/verify-contract, chacha-encrypt/aead-integrity/nonce-length, hybrid-roundtrip/supported, capability-detection-ran/xwing-not-in-chrome150); telemetry POSTs returned 202 during validation.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables throughout, button background+color pairs, focus-visible styles, no static-card pattern; edits were copy/attribute/minimal-JS-string level and preserve layout.

accessibility.rationale: role=status/aria-live on status lines and artifact hex fields, labeled selects/textareas/checkbox rows, aria-label on matrix table, disabled states exposed semantically; the detection matrix announces its summary through the same status live region.

mobile_desktop_parity.rationale: Matrix pass after two in-place fixes found by this cycle's 390px validation: the feature index overflowed via a slash-joined code-token run (page-local code{overflow-wrap:anywhere} — 498px → clean), and the capability-matrix table overflowed (468px via nowrap alg cells + unwrapped status detail — overflow-wrap + dropped nowrap → 342px). All six pages then measured scrollWidth equals viewport at both 1280×800 and 390×844 with every interactive state exercised; main action buttons ≈45px, controls wrap in flex rows.

openQuestions.title: Re-verify supports() presence and OT/ship status when the runtime feature next changes
openQuestions.detail: Copy is provenanced to the 2026-07-24 fetch of the direct chromestatus API (updated 2026-06-17: dev trial 150, OT desktop 151–154 with origin_trial_id 1379790335835635713, ship estimate unset, status 'Proposed') and to Chromium main subtle_crypto.idl (all six new members RuntimeEnabled=WebCryptoPQC). If the static supports() lands outside the gate, the OT window/ship estimate changes, or X-Wing lands in Chromium, update the capability-matrix and family-index copy and re-run the suite.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible live region announcements for dynamic probe/status results after button activation
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce dynamic state through live regions tied to the activating control; keep semantic tables and named controls.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: Verified applied across all five concepts (status lines + artifact fields with aria-live observed in the a11y tree; labeled parameter selects and checkboxes; matrix summary announced via role=status).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: chrome-devtools-mcp a11y-tree snapshots on all six pages, 2026-07-24

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible form controls selects checkboxes and labeled inputs in interactive demo pages
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Associate labels with every input/select, group related controls, and expose state changes programmatically.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: Verified applied: parameter-set selects carry aria-labels, tamper checkboxes sit inside label elements, textareas are labeled; no form-structure changes were needed for this cycle's copy/JS-string fixes.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: chrome-devtools-mcp snapshots + control exercises at 1280×800 and 390×844

summary: Source-review hardening of the WebCrypto family: corrected the stale 'supports() not yet shipped' claim with direct Chromium evidence (subtle_crypto.idl — all six new members including both supports() overloads are RuntimeEnabled=WebCryptoPQC), made the capability-matrix call static SubtleCrypto.supports() on the interface object first, with a crypto.subtle.generateKey() fallback and per-cell method labels, verified X-Wing's exact status (in the chromestatus summary for this feature; absent from the WICG spec and Chromium), restored the full member list on the index lede (decapsulateKey + supports()), provenanced availability (dev trial 150 vs registerable OT 151–154, no default-on milestone), fixed the private-key 'non-extractable' mislabel, and fixed two mobile-overflow defects found during validation (index code tokens, matrix table). Added the family's missing immutable conformance suite (8 assertions, anchors verified against the spec's real IDs; missing-suite denominator 14→13).
